name: tight-ship
description: Full coding-agent methodology suite: design, plans, TDD, multi-agent tasks, verify, review, and lean code size.

interface.shortDescription: Design, plans, TDD, debugging, and delivery workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use tight-ship to guide agent work through design, implementation planning, test-driven development, systematic debugging, parallel execution, code review, and finish-the-branch workflows — with a lean code size ladder throughout.
defaultPrompt: I'd like to build a feature.
